title: Principal Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions:
Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions!
